cases.passage: As I walked into the office of the Principal, I was greeted by his friendly smile. I had come to request an extension for submitting the school magazine, which was due in a week. The Principal, Mr. Kumar, listened attentively to my request and asked for the reasons behind the delay. I explained that our team had faced some difficulties in coordinating with the photographers and writers, and that we needed a bit more time to complete the project. Mr. Kumar understood our situation and agreed to extend the deadline by a week.

questions.q: What was the reason for writing the letter?
opts: (B) To request an extension for submitting the school magazine
(D) To inform about a school event
questions.explanation: The letter was written to request an extension for submitting the school magazine.

questions.q: What did the writer ask the Principal for?
opts: (B) An extension for submitting the school magazine
questions.explanation: The writer asked the Principal for an extension for submitting the school magazine.

questions.q: How did the Principal respond to the writer's request?
opts: (B) He agreed to extend the deadline
(D) He told the writer to submit the magazine on time
questions.explanation: The Principal agreed to extend the deadline by a week.

questions.q: What was the reason for the delay in submitting the school magazine?
opts: (C) Difficulty in coordinating with the photographers and writers
questions.explanation: The writer explained that they faced difficulties in coordinating with the photographers and writers, which led to the delay.

questions.q: Who did the writer meet in the office?
questions.explanation: The writer met the Principal, Mr. Kumar, in the office.

cases.passage: I am writing to express my gratitude to the school authorities for inviting me to conduct a workshop on environmental conservation. It was a great experience for me to interact with the students and share my knowledge with them. The students were very enthusiastic and asked some thought-provoking questions. I was impressed by their curiosity and eagerness to learn. I would like to thank the Principal, Mr. Sharma, and the teachers for their support and cooperation.

questions.q: What was the writer invited to do?
opts: (A) To conduct a workshop on environmental conservation
(B) To give a lecture on history
questions.explanation: The writer was invited to conduct a workshop on environmental conservation.

questions.q: Who did the writer thank for their support?
questions.explanation: The writer thanked the Principal and the teachers for their support and cooperation.

questions.q: How did the writer feel about the students?
questions.explanation: The writer was impressed by the students' curiosity and eagerness to learn.

questions.q: Who was the writer impressed by?
questions.explanation: The writer was impressed by the students' curiosity and eagerness to learn.

questions.q: What did the writer share with the students?
opts: (C) Their opinions on a particular topic
(D) Their thoughts on a particular issue
questions.explanation: The writer shared their knowledge on environmental conservation with the students.
